plugins.name: youtube
plugins.description: Write YouTube scripts, descriptions, companion newsletters, and click-worthy titles — all informed by your voice and audience.

plugins.name: newsletter
plugins.description: Write authority newsletters, how-to guides, case studies, and more — each skill produces a specific newsletter format ready to publish.

plugins.name: social
plugins.description: Create high-performing social content — threads, LinkedIn posts, Substack notes, batched content, and endless content ideas from a single topic.

plugins.name: ghostwriting
plugins.description: Set up a complete co-writer system for your ghostwriting clients — build their profiles, capture their voice, map their IP, and plan their content.

plugins.name: offer-builder
plugins.description: Build irresistible offers, sales pages, email sequences, and lead magnets for digital products and services.

plugins.name: brand
plugins.description: Optimize your professional presence — social bios, LinkedIn profile, brand audits, and elevator pitches.

plugins.name: content-engine
plugins.description: Turn one idea into dozens of content pieces — extract ideas, repurpose across platforms, plan your calendar, and define your content pillars.

plugins.name: freelance
plugins.description: Win and manage client work — proposals, scopes of work, progress reports, cold pitches, and case studies.

plugins.name: course-creator
plugins.description: Build and launch online courses — structure your curriculum, write lessons, create sales pages, and plan your launch sequence.

plugins.name: presentations
plugins.description: Create polished slide decks — presentation builder, pitch decks, and workshop slides.
